PHYSN_ZIP_CD 

LABEL: Line Place of Service (POS) Physician Zip Code 

DESCRIPTION: The field used to identify the zip code where the services were rendered. 

SHORT NAME: PHYSN_ZIP_CD 

LONG NAME: PHYSN_ZIP_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 15 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Effective with Version”'K”.
